Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Blaqmart Stationery - Production Ready

## Features
- Complete e-commerce platform for school stationery
- Shop by Grade \(Grade R to Matric\)
- Stationery pack bundles
- Custom hamper builder
- PayFast & Yoco payment integration
- Cash on Delivery for local areas
- Admin dashboard for products, orders, categories

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14 App Router
- Prisma ORM \(SQLite dev / PostgreSQL prod\)
- Tailwind CSS + Radix UI
- NextAuth.js authentication
- Supabase for image storage

## Target Market
Northern Cape: Warrenton, Jan Kempdorp, Hartswater, Christiana

EOF
